src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Remove the CommandLineRunner implementation and associated exit code logic to simplify the application entry point.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Removed implements CommandLineRunner, the run() method, and the inner ExitException class.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Remove explicit component scan configuration as it is redundant with the default behavior of @SpringBootApplication.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Remove unused java.io.IOException import as the method no longer throws or catches it.
Inject KitaFinderService to fetch data from the backend instead of returning hardcoded JSON.
Inject ModelMapper to handle object mapping between domain and API models.
Inject AuditService to log request/response details for compliance.
Inject Validator to perform bean validation on the response object.
Remove ObjectMapper injection as it is no longer used for manual JSON parsing.
Add PreAuthorize annotation to enforce role-based access control or allow unsecured access based on profile.
Add SecurityRequirement annotation to document OAuth2 scopes in Swagger/OpenAPI documentation.
Enable Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) for the controller.
Update Swagger operation tags and summary to reflect the correct module and description.
Add 204, 422, and 5XX error response definitions to the API documentation.
Extract path variable name into a constant for consistency and maintainability.
Replace hardcoded JSON response with actual service call, mapping, and validation logic.
Validate the mapped Institute object and throw ConstraintViolationException if invalid.
Store request and response metadata in the audit service for compliance tracking.
Corrected a typo in the comment mapping the Java field to the database column name.
Updated the API schema description to reflect that the parents list is now calculated from SB1 and SB2 only, excluding ABW.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Changed description from 'SB1, SB2 und ABW' to 'SB1 und SB2'

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: The Javadoc comment for the class was truncated or corrupted, likely due to a merge conflict resolution or accidental edit.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: Changed Javadoc from 'Adresse des Kindes...' to 'Adress'

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Add @Valid annotation to enable recursive validation of the nested Child collection.
Initialize the children collection with an empty ArrayList to prevent null pointer exceptions.
Corrected the spelling of the field 'intituteName' to 'instituteName' to match the semantic meaning and likely external API contracts.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.human_impl: private String intituteName; -> private String instituteName;

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Added @Valid annotation to the groups collection to ensure nested objects are validated recursively.
Change the visibility of the nested enum ParentType from package-private to public.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 3.2.4 to 3.5.5 to support Java 21 and access newer features.
Add spring-boot-starter-security to enable Spring Security features.
Add spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server to support OAuth2 resource server functionality.
Add the PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add the Flyway PostgreSQL extension to support PostgreSQL-specific migration features.
Add ModelMapper library for object-to-object mapping.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency for bean validation support.
Add hibernate-validator dependency to provide the implementation for bean validation.
Add logstash-logback-encoder to format logs for Logstash consumption.
Add spring-security-test to facilitate testing of security configurations.
Remove the duplicate springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency that was listed twice.

.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Update actions/checkout to v4 to support newer GitHub Actions features and security patches.
Update advanced-security/policy-as-code to v2.7.2 for latest policy definitions.
Add workflow_dispatch trigger to allow manual triggering with a version input for image tagging.
Define environment variables for Maven project root and build target to standardize paths.
Add a dedicated build job that sets up JDK 21 and runs Maven tests and installation.
.github/workflows/build.yaml.human_impl: jobs: build: uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '21'

.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Upload build artifacts to allow downstream jobs to access the compiled application.
Add a job to build and push Docker images to GitHub Container Registry (GHCR).
Extract metadata and tags for Docker images, specifically supporting semver tagging from workflow inputs.
Authenticate with GitHub Container Registry to allow pushing images.
Set up QEMU and Docker Buildx for multi-platform image building support.
